arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma 1-1 Napoli: Match Report
arts.sum: In a thrilling Serie A encounter at the Stadio Olimpico, AS Roma snatched a dramatic 1-1 draw against league leaders Napoli, courtesy of a stoppage-time strike from Angelino. The result ended Napoli's seven-game winning streak and prevented Antonio Conte's side from extending their lead at the top of the table. arts.ttl: Roma in Advanced Talks for Empoli’s Saba Goglichidze: Deal Could Be Imminent
arts.sum: Roma have emerged as a surprise contender in the transfer market, engaging in advanced negotiations with Empoli for their promising young defender, Saba Goglichidze. The Giallorossi are keen to strengthen their backline with a youthful and talented prospect, and have identified the Georgian as their primary target.
